                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-2-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('about-page-slider-2-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider2: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend': sliderTrackEl não encontrado.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("AboutPageSlider2: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag: sliderContentEl não encontrado.");
            }
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) { // Mobile: 16 items, 16 pages
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; // First item
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount -1) / 2); // Middle item (e.g. page 7 for 16 pages)
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; // Last item
                        } else { // Desktop: 4 items per page, 4 pages
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; // Page 1
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = 1; // Page 2 (can adjust if needed for 4 pages)
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount -1; // Page 4 (last page)
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            } else {
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider2: Nenhum .about-page-slider-2-pagination-segment-clickable encontrado.");
            }
            
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
                if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                    console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Mudança de visualização detectada (mobile/desktop), reconfigurando o slider.");
                    setupSlider(); 
                } else {
                    if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                    const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-2-page'); 
                    const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                    pages.forEach(page => {
                        page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                    });
                    goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                    updatePagination(); 
                }
            });
            console.log("AboutPageSlider2: Event listeners anexados.");
        }
        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); 
    </script>


    <script>
    (function() { // IIFE para encapsular o script e evitar conflitos globais
        // Variáveis de estado do slider (mantidas no escopo da IIFE)
        let sliderContentEl, sliderTrackEl, paginationActiveBarEl, paginationSegmentsClickable;
        let actualPagesCount = 0; 
        let currentPageIndex = 0; 
        let currentTrackIndex = 1; 
        let isDragging = false;
        let startX, currentX, initialTrackX = 0;
        const dragThreshold = 50; 
        const MOBILE_BREAKPOINT = 640; 
        let previousIsMobile = isMobileView();

        function isMobileView() {
            return window.innerWidth < MOBILE_BREAKPOINT;
        }
        
        function getSliderWidth() {
            // sliderContentEl é definido dentro de setupSlider
            if (!sliderContentEl) { 
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: getSliderWidth - sliderContentEl não está definido ainda (chamado antes do setup ou elemento não encontrado).");
                return 0;
            }
            return sliderContentEl.offsetWidth; 
        }

        function setupSlider() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Iniciando setupSlider."); 

            // Seleção de elementos movida para DENTRO do setupSlider
            sliderContentEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-content');
            sliderTrackEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-track');
            paginationActiveBarEl = document.getElementById('about-page-pagination-active-bar');
            paginationSegmentsClickable = document.querySelectorAll('.about-page-pagination-segment-clickable');

            if (!sliderContentEl) {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Elemento #about-page-slider-content não encontrado. Abortando setup.");
                return;
            }
            if (!sliderTrackEl) {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Elemento #about-page-slider-track não encontrado. Abortando setup.");
                return;
            }
            if (!paginationActiveBarEl) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Elemento #about-page-pagination-active-bar não encontrado. Paginação visual não funcionará.");
            }
             if (paginationSegmentsClickable.length !== 3) {
                console.warn(`AboutPageSlider: Esperava 3 .about-page-pagination-segment-clickable, encontrou ${paginationSegmentsClickable.length}. Cliques na paginação podem não funcionar como esperado.`);
            }
            
            const initialItemElements = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-item-container');
            console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Encontrados ${initialItemElements.length} itens (.about-page-slider-item-container) no HTML.`);

            if (initialItemElements.length === 0) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum item encontrado no HTML do track. O slider ficará vazio.");
                sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 
                actualPagesCount = 0;
                updatePagination(); 
                return; 
            }
            
            const initialItemsHTML = [];
            initialItemElements.forEach(itemEl => {
                initialItemsHTML.push(itemEl.outerHTML);
            });

            sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 

            const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
            let dataForSlider; 
            
            if (currentIsMobile) {
                dataForSlider = initialItemsHTML.map(itemHTML => [itemHTML]); 
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Visualização Mobile. Número de páginas (itens): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            } else {
                dataForSlider = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < initialItemsHTML.length; i += 3) {
                    dataForSlider.push(initialItemsHTML.slice(i, i + 3)); 
                }
                actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length; 
                console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Visualização Desktop. Número de páginas (grupos de 3): ${actualPagesCount}`);
            }
            
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length > 0 ) { 
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider: actualPagesCount é 0 após processar os itens. Verifique a lógica de agrupamento ou o número de itens HTML. O slider ficará vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return; 
            } else if (actualPagesCount === 0 && initialItemsHTML.length === 0) {
                 console.log("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum item para processar, slider permanecerá vazio.");
                 updatePagination();
                 return;
            }


            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1], 
                ...dataForSlider,                    
                dataForSlider[0]                     
            ];
            
            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderPageWidth === 0) {
                console.warn("AboutPageSlider: getSliderWidth() retornou 0. sliderContentEl pode não estar visível/renderizado com largura. As páginas do Slider terão largura 0.");
            }

            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML, index) => { 
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML || pageDataItemsHTML.length === 0) { 
                    console.warn(`AboutPageSlider: Tentando renderizar uma página vazia ou indefinida no índice do track ${index}. Isso pode ocorrer se 'dataForSlider' estiver malformado para os clones.`);
                    return; 
                }
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'about-page-slider-page'; 
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`; 
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join(''); 
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = 0; 
            currentTrackIndex = 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false); 
            updatePagination(); 
            previousIsMobile = currentIsMobile; 
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-initialized');
            console.log(`AboutPageSlider: Configuração do slider concluída. Páginas lógicas: ${actualPagesCount}, Track Index inicial: ${currentTrackIndex}`);
            
            // Atribuição de event listeners DEPOIS que os elementos são confirmados
            attachEventListeners();
        }
        
        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getSliderWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex; 
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            let targetRealPageIndex;

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) { 
                targetRealPageIndex = 0;
            } else { 
                targetRealPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }

            currentPageIndex = targetRealPageIndex; 
            updatePagination(); 

            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false); 
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            }
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) { 
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return; 
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return; 
            
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1; 
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true); 
        }

        function updatePagination() {
            if (actualPagesCount === 0 || !paginationActiveBarEl) return; 
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount; 
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100; 
            
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none'; 
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getSliderWidth(); 
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || !sliderTrackEl) return; 
            e.preventDefault(); 
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`; 
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging) return;
            isDragging = false;
            if (sliderContentEl) sliderContentEl.classList.remove('about-page-slider-dragging'); 
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out'; 

            const diffX = currentX - startX;

            if (Math.abs(diffX) > dragThreshold) { 
                if (diffX < 0) { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + 1, true);
                } else { 
                    goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex - 1, true);
                }
            } else { 
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function attachEventListeners() {
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Anexando event listeners.");
            if (sliderTrackEl) { 
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);
            } else {
                console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar 'transitionend': sliderTrackEl não encontrado.");
            }

            if (sliderContentEl) { 
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                sliderContentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
            } else {
                 console.error("AboutPageSlider: Não foi possível anexar listeners de drag: sliderContentEl não encontrado.");
            }
            // Listeners de mousemove e mouseup/touchend no document para melhor experiência
            // Estes podem ser anexados mesmo se sliderContentEl não for encontrado, pois não dependem dele diretamente
            document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
            document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
            document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { 
                if (isDragging) handleDragEnd();
            });
            document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
            document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);

            if (paginationSegmentsClickable && paginationSegmentsClickable.length > 0) {
                paginationSegmentsClickable.forEach(segment => {
                    segment.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const segmentIndex = parseInt(segment.dataset.pageSegment);
                        let pageIndexToNavigate;

                        if (isMobileView()) {
                            if (segmentIndex === 0) pageIndexToNavigate = 0; 
                            else if (segmentIndex === 1) pageIndexToNavigate = Math.floor((actualPagesCount - 1) / 2); 
                            else pageIndexToNavigate = actualPagesCount - 1; 
                        } else {
                            pageIndexToNavigate = segmentIndex; 
                        }
                        navigateToPage(pageIndexToNavigate);
                    });
                });
            } else {
                 console.warn("AboutPageSlider: Nenhum .about-page-pagination-segment-clickable encontrado para anexar listeners de clique.");
            }
            
            window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                const currentIsMobile = isMobileView();
                if (currentIsMobile !== previousIsMobile) {
                    console.log("AboutPageSlider: Mudança de visualização detectada (mobile/desktop), reconfigurando o slider.");
                    setupSlider(); // Re-setup completo se o tipo de visualização mudar
                } else {
                    // Apenas ajusta larguras se o tipo de visualização não mudou
                    if (!sliderTrackEl) return; 
                    const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-page'); 
                    const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                    pages.forEach(page => {
                        page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; 
                    });
                    goToTrackIndex(currentPageIndex + 1, false); 
                    updatePagination(); 
                }
            });
            console.log("AboutPageSlider: Event listeners anexados.");
        }

        // Usar addEventListener para 'load' é geralmente mais seguro do que atribuir window.onload diretamente
        window.addEventListener('load', setupSlider);
    })(); // Fim da IIFE
    </script>


<script>
        // IIFE to encapsulate
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.quote-slide');
                const dots = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-dot');
                let currentSlideIndex = 0;

                if (slides.length === 0 || dots.length === 0 || slides.length !== dots.length) {
                    console.error("Quote slider: Number of slides and pagination dots do not match or elements not found.");
                    return;
                }

                function showSlide(index) {
                    if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) return;

                    slides[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active-quote');
                    dots[currentSlideIndex].classList.remove('active');

                    slides[index].classList.add('active-quote');
                    dots[index].classList.add('active');

                    currentSlideIndex = index;
                }

                dots.forEach(dot => {
                    dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
                        const targetIndex = parseInt(dot.getAttribute('data-slide-target'), 10);
                        showSlide(targetIndex);
                    });
                });

                showSlide(0);

            });
        })();
    </script>

<script>
        // IIFE para encapsular
        (function() {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
                const listItems = document.querySelectorAll('.expandable-list .list-item');
                const imageDisplay = document.getElementById('image-display');
                let activeItem = null;

                if (listItems.length === 0 || !imageDisplay) {
                    console.error("Elementos da lista ou display de imagem não encontrados.");
                    return;
                }

                // Função para calcular e definir a posição/altura do indicador
                function positionIndicator(item) {
                    const indicator = item.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                    const contentWrapper = item.querySelector('.item-content-wrapper');
                    const header = item.querySelector('.item-header');
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');

                    if (!indicator || !contentWrapper || !header || !description) return;

                    // Posição do topo do header RELATIVA AO list-item
                    const headerTopRelativeToListItem = contentWrapper.offsetTop + header.offsetTop;

                    // Calcula a altura do conteúdo visível
                    let contentHeight = header.offsetHeight;
                    if (item.classList.contains('active')) {
                        const descMarginTop = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(description).marginTop) || 0;
                        // Usa scrollHeight para altura real da descrição
                        contentHeight += descMarginTop + description.scrollHeight;
                    } else {
                         // Se inativo, a altura deve ser zero para o cálculo do indicador
                         contentHeight = 0; // Garante que indicador inativo tenha altura 0 no cálculo
                    }

                    // Aplica os estilos ao indicador
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        indicator.style.top = `${headerTopRelativeToListItem}px`;
                        // Define altura zero se não estiver ativo, caso contrário usa a calculada
                        indicator.style.height = item.classList.contains('active') ? `${Math.max(0, contentHeight)}px` : '0px';
                    });
                }

                // Função para trocar imagem com fade
                function changeImageWithFade(imageUrl) {
                     if (!imageDisplay) return;
                     imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', `url('${imageUrl}')`);
                     imageDisplay.classList.add('fade-in');
                     setTimeout(() => {
                         imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${imageUrl}')`;
                         imageDisplay.classList.remove('fade-in');
                         imageDisplay.style.removeProperty('--bg-image-before');
                     }, 800);
                 }
                 imageDisplay.style.setProperty('--bg-image-before', 'none');


                function setActiveItem(clickedItem) {
                    if (clickedItem === activeItem) return;

                    // Desativa o item anterior
                    if (activeItem) {
                        const oldDesc = activeItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                        activeItem.classList.remove('active'); // Remove classe do LI
                        if (oldDesc) {
                            oldDesc.style.maxHeight = '0px';
                            oldDesc.style.marginTop = '0px';
                        }
                         // Reseta explicitamente a altura do indicador antigo
                         const oldIndicator = activeItem.querySelector('.item-indicator');
                         if (oldIndicator) oldIndicator.style.height = '0px';
                    }

                    // Ativa o novo item
                    const newDesc = clickedItem.querySelector('.item-description');
                    clickedItem.classList.add('active'); // Adiciona classe ao LI
                    if (newDesc) {
                        newDesc.style.marginTop = '0.5rem';
                        // Define max-height para animar abertura
                         requestAnimationFrame(() => { // Garante cálculo após DOM update
                             newDesc.style.maxHeight = newDesc.scrollHeight + "px";
                             // Posiciona o indicador APÓS definir maxHeight
                             positionIndicator(clickedItem); // Chama para definir altura e top
                         });
                    } else {
                        // Se não houver descrição, posiciona baseado só no header
                        positionIndicator(clickedItem);
                    }

                    activeItem = clickedItem; // Atualiza referência

                    // Atualiza imagem
                    const imageSrc = clickedItem.getAttribute('data-image');
                    if (imageSrc) {
                        changeImageWithFade(imageSrc);
                    }
                }

                // Adiciona listeners de clique
                listItems.forEach(item => {
                    item.addEventListener('click', () => { // Listener no LI
                        setActiveItem(item);
                    });

                    // Listener para ajustar indicador após transição da descrição
                    const description = item.querySelector('.item-description');
                     if (description) {
                         description.addEventListener('transitionend', (event) => {
                             if (event.propertyName === 'max-height' && item.classList.contains('active')) {
                                 // Recalcula altura/posição do indicador após animação
                                 positionIndicator(item);
                             }
                         });
                     }
                });

                // Ativa o primeiro item inicialmente
                if (listItems.length > 0) {
                    const firstItem = listItems[0];
                    const initialImageSrc = firstItem.getAttribute('data-image');

                    if (initialImageSrc && imageDisplay) {
                        imageDisplay.style.backgroundImage = `url('${initialImageSrc}')`;
                    }
                    // Usa a função setActiveItem para inicializar corretamente
                    setTimeout(() => {
                        setActiveItem(firstItem);
                    }, 50);
                }

                 // Reposiciona indicador no resize
                 window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
                     if (activeItem) {
                         setTimeout(() => positionIndicator(activeItem), 100);
                     }
                 });

            });
        })();
    </script>


<script>
// IIFE para encapsular
(function() {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.slide');
        const paginationItems = document.querySelectorAll('.pagination-item');
        const paginationBarContainer = document.querySelector('.pagination-bar-container');

        let paginationIndicator = document.querySelector('.pagination-indicator');
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            console.log("Slider principal: Criando o elemento '.pagination-indicator' dinamicamente.");
            paginationIndicator = document.createElement('div');
            paginationIndicator.classList.add('pagination-indicator');
            paginationBarContainer.appendChild(paginationIndicator);
        }

        if (slides.length === 0 || paginationItems.length === 0 || slides.length !== paginationItems.length) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Número de slides e itens de paginação não correspondem ou elementos não encontrados. Verifique as classes '.slide' e '.pagination-item'.");
            return;
        }
        if (!paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) { // Verificação ajustada: só erro se o container existe mas o indicador não pôde ser criado/achado
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-indicator' não pôde ser encontrado ou criado.");
            // Não retorna aqui, pois o indicador pode ser opcional para a funcionalidade básica se o CSS o esconder
        }
        if (!paginationBarContainer) {
            console.error("Slider principal: Elemento '.pagination-bar-container' não encontrado. O indicador não pode ser posicionado e o scrollIntoView não funcionará como esperado.");
            // Considerar retornar se paginationBarContainer é essencial para outras funcionalidades além do indicador
        }

        // Função para atualizar o slide ativo, item de paginação ativo e indicador
        // Adicionamos o parâmetro 'isInitialLoad' com valor padrão 'false'
        function goToSlide(index, isInitialLoad = false) {
            if (index < 0 || index >= slides.length) {
                console.error("Índice do slide fora dos limites:", index);
                return;
            }

            const currentActiveSlide = document.querySelector('.slide.active-slide');
            const currentActivePaginationItem = document.querySelector('.pagination-item.active-pagination-item');
            if (currentActiveSlide) {
                currentActiveSlide.classList.remove('active-slide');
            }
            if (currentActivePaginationItem) {
                currentActivePaginationItem.classList.remove('active-pagination-item');
            }

            slides[index].classList.add('active-slide');
            paginationItems[index].classList.add('active-pagination-item');

            if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[index];
                const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;

                requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                    const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                    const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                    if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                        paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                        paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                    }
                });

                // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI:
                // Só executa scrollIntoView se NÃO for a carga inicial
                if (!isInitialLoad) {
                    targetPaginationItem.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', inline: 'center', block: 'nearest' });
                }
            }
        }

        paginationItems.forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('mouseover', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });

            item.addEventListener('click', () => {
                const slideIndex = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-slide-index'), 10);
                if (!isNaN(slideIndex)) {
                    goToSlide(slideIndex); // Chamada normal, isInitialLoad será false por padrão
                } else {
                    console.error("Atributo 'data-slide-index' não encontrado ou inválido no item:", item);
                }
            });
        });

        setTimeout(() => {
            // MODIFICAÇÃO AQUI: Passamos 'true' para isInitialLoad
            goToSlide(0, true);
        }, 100);


        let resizeTimeout;
        window.addEventListener('resize', () => {
            clearTimeout(resizeTimeout);
            resizeTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                if (currentActiveIndex !== -1 && paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
                    const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                    const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                    const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                        if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                            const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                            const indicatorWidth = targetPaginationItem.offsetWidth;
                            paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            paginationIndicator.style.width = `${indicatorWidth}px`;
                        }
                    });
                }
            }, 250);
        });

        if (paginationIndicator && paginationBarContainer) {
            let scrollTimeout;
            paginationBarContainer.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
                clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
                scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
                    const currentActiveIndex = Array.from(paginationItems).findIndex(item => item.classList.contains('active-pagination-item'));
                    if (currentActiveIndex !== -1) {
                        const targetPaginationItem = paginationItems[currentActiveIndex];
                        const containerRect = paginationBarContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const itemRect = targetPaginationItem.getBoundingClientRect();
                        const scrollOffset = paginationBarContainer.scrollLeft;
                        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
                            if (document.body.contains(paginationIndicator)) {
                                const indicatorLeft = itemRect.left - containerRect.left + scrollOffset;
                                paginationIndicator.style.left = `${indicatorLeft}px`;
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }, 150);
            }, { passive: true });
        }
    });
})();
</script>


<script>
  // IIFE para encapsular o código e evitar conflitos globais
  (function() {
    // Espera o HTML carregar
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      const divider = document.getElementById('scroll-divider');

      // Verifica se o elemento divisor existe
      if (!divider) {
        console.error("Elemento divisor (#scroll-divider) não encontrado. Verifique o ID no HTML.");
        return; // Interrompe se não encontrar
      }

      let startTime = null; // Para rastrear o tempo da animação
      const animationDuration = 3000; // Duração de um ciclo COMPLETO (ida e volta) em ms (ex: 3 segundos)
      const mainColor = '#7735fc';      // Cor principal/escura
      const highlightColor = '#ba97fc'; // Cor clara que vai se mover
      // *** AUMENTADO O TAMANHO DA FAIXA ***
      const bandWidthPercent = 90;      // Largura da faixa clara em porcentagem (ex: 70% - bem maior)

      // Função que será chamada repetidamente para animar
      const animateDivider = (timestamp) => {
        // Garante que o divisor ainda existe no DOM
        if (!document.body.contains(divider)) {
            console.log("Elemento divisor removido do DOM, parando a animação.");
            return;
        }

        if (!startTime) {
          startTime = timestamp; // Define o tempo inicial na primeira execução
        }

        const elapsedTime = timestamp - startTime;
        // Calcula o progresso dentro de um ciclo (0 a 1)
        const progressRaw = (elapsedTime % animationDuration) / animationDuration;

        // --- Lógica de Animação Modificada (Ping-Pong) ---

        // Usa cosseno para criar um movimento suave de ida e volta (0 -> 1 -> 0)
        // Math.cos(progressRaw * Math.PI * 2) vai de 1 a -1 e volta a 1.
        // (1 - cos) / 2 mapeia isso para o intervalo 0 a 1 e volta a 0.
        const angle = progressRaw * Math.PI * 2; // Ângulo para um ciclo completo (0 a 2*PI)
        const pingPongProgress = (1 - Math.cos(angle)) / 2; // Valor oscilante entre 0 e 1

        // Calcula a posição central da faixa clara (0% a 100%) com base no progresso oscilante
        const centerPercent = pingPongProgress * 100;

        // Calcula as posições de início e fim da transição para a cor clara
        // Garante que as posições fiquem dentro de 0 e 100
        const startHighlight = Math.max(0, centerPercent - bandWidthPercent / 2);
        const endHighlight = Math.min(100, centerPercent + bandWidthPercent / 2);

        // Define o gradiente para ir de cima para baixo ('to bottom')
        divider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to bottom,
          ${mainColor} 0%,
          ${mainColor} ${startHighlight}%,
          ${highlightColor} ${centerPercent}%,
          ${mainColor} ${endHighlight}%,
          ${mainColor} 100%
        )`;
        // --- Fim da Lógica Modificada ---

        // Solicita o próximo quadro da animação, criando o loop
        requestAnimationFrame(animateDivider);
      };

      // Inicia o loop da animação
      requestAnimationFrame(animateDivider);

    });
  })(); // Executa a IIFE
</script>



<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Seleciona o botão de fechar
    const closeButton = document.getElementById('close-business-bar');
    // Seleciona o wrapper da barra de negócios
    const businessBarWrapper = document.getElementById('business-bar-wrapper');
    // Seleciona o corpo do documento
    const bodyElement = document.body;

    // Verifica se ambos os elementos existem para evitar erros
    if (closeButton && businessBarWrapper && bodyElement) {
        closeButton.addEventListener('click', function() {
            // Adiciona a classe 'hidden' ao wrapper da barra para escondê-la
            businessBarWrapper.classList.add('hidden');
            
            // Adiciona a classe 'business-bar-hidden' ao body para ajustar o header
            bodyElement.classList.add('business-bar-hidden');
            
            // Opcional: Log para confirmar que o evento ocorreu (bom para debug)
            // console.log('Business bar fechada!');
        });
    } else {
        if (!closeButton) {
            console.error('Botão #close-business-bar não encontrado.');
        }
        if (!businessBarWrapper) {
            console.error('Elemento #business-bar-wrapper não encontrado.');
        }
    }
});
</script>

  <div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content=""><p class="" style="white-space:pre-wrap;">After more than a decade of academic research, PsiQuantum was founded on the premise that photonic qubits, together with leverage of mature semiconductor manufacturing processes, could provide a fast path to a commercially useful, million-qubit quantum computer. <br><br>Now, PsiQuantum builds thousands of wafers of quantum chips in a tier-1 foundry, operates cryogenic cabinets designed to support hundreds of chips, and is optimizing fault-tolerant algorithms that will solve valuable problems using our first-generation computers.</p></div>

    <title>About Page Slider</title>

    <!-- Inter Font Import -->

    <style>
        /* --- START: SLIDER CSS --- */

        /* Main container */
        #about-page-slider-outter-container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1440px;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
            padding: 0rem 0;
        }

        /* Content area */
        #about-page-slider-outter-content {
            cursor: grab;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            margin-bottom: 0px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        #about-page-slider-outter-content.about-page-slider-outter-dragging {
            cursor: grabbing;
        }

        #about-page-slider-outter-content.about-page-slider-outter-dragging * {
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-user-select: none;
            -ms-user-select: none;
        }

        /* Track container */
        #about-page-slider-outter-track {
            display: flex;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease-in-out;
        }

        /* Slider page */
        .about-page-slider-outter-page {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            padding: 0; 
            gap: 20px;
            margin-right: 20px;
        }

        /* Slider item */
        .about-page-slider-outter-item-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            width: 100%;
        }

        /* Item image */
        .about-page-slider-outter-item-image {
            width: 100%;
            height: 60%;
            aspect-ratio: 450 / 535;
            border-radius: 5px;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            object-fit: cover;
            pointer-events: none;
        }

        /* Item title */
        .about-page-slider-outter-item-title {
            font-size: 22px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            font-family: 'Inter Medium';
            color: #ffffff;
            margin-top: 15px;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }

        .about-page-slider-outter-item-title a {
            color: inherit;
            text-decoration: none;
            transition: opacity 0.2s ease;
        }
        .about-page-slider-outter-item-title a:hover {
            opacity: 0.8; 
        }

        /* Item text */
        .about-page-slider-outter-item-text {
            font-size: 1rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
            font-weight: 300;
            color: #ffffff;
        }
        
        .about-page-slider-outter-item-text a {
            color: #ffffff; 
            text-decoration: underline;
        }
         .about-page-slider-outter-item-text a:hover {
            text-decoration: none;
        }

        /* --- RESPONSIVENESS --- */

        /* TABLET: 2 items per page */
        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .about-page-slider-outter-item-container {
                width: calc(50% - 10px);
            }
        }

        /* DESKTOP: 3 items per page */
        @media (min-width: 1200px) {
            .about-page-slider-outter-item-container {
                width: calc(33.3333% - 13.3333px);
            }
        }

        /* --- PAGINATION --- */
        #about-page-slider-outter-pagination-controls {
            display: flex;
            width: 100%;
            height: 2px;
            background-color: #333;
            position: relative;
        }

        #about-page-slider-outter-pagination-active-bar {
            height: 100%;
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7735fc 0%, #7735fc 20%, #ba97fc 50%, #7735fc 80%, #7735fc 100%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: aboutPageSliderSweepDirect 1.8s linear infinite alternate;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease-in-out, width 0.5s ease-in-out;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        @keyframes aboutPageSliderSweepDirect {
            0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
            100% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        }

        .about-page-slider-outter-pagination-segment-clickable {
            flex: 1;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }
    </style>

    <div id="about-page-slider-outter-container">
        <div id="about-page-slider-outter-content">
            <div id="about-page-slider-outter-track" style="transition: none; transform: translateX(-1035px);"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
             <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/68f1557292aaa97118749916/1760646521788/RMW-QuantumShoreGroundbreaking-0111-6802.jpg" alt="September 2025 groundbreaking ceremony at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Sept+2025';" width="3000" height="2000">
             <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">September 2025</h3>
             <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">
              PsiQuantum breaks ground on the company’s site at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park in Chicago, where co-founder and CEO Jeremy O'Brien joined Governor JB Pritzker and other state and local leaders for a ceremony at the former U.S. Steel South Works site.
            </p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683f49ecad71e14dacf0eaaf/1748978165385/cut-2016.png" alt="Timeline event for 2016" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=2016';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">2016</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">Founded in 2016, PsiQuantum has one mission: To build and deploy the first useful quantum computers.</p>
        </div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683f49ed234341246c8b7e9f/1748978165455/cut-April+2019.png" alt="Timeline event for April 2019" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=April+2019';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">April 2019</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum establishes manufacturing partnership with GlobalFoundries and begins to integrate quantum photonic devices (including single photon sources and superconducting detectors) into a mature, highvolume, commercial semiconductor foundry.</p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683f49ec4052b615a7580194/1748978158974/cut-January+2021.png" alt="Timeline event for January 2021" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Jan+2021';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title"><a href="https://arxiv.org/abs/2101.09310" target="_blank">January 2021</a></h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">We introduce Fusion-Based Quantum Computing (FBQC) and publish a foundational framework for fault-tolerant quantum computing using entangling measurements, paving the way for modular, scalable photonic architectures with more forgiving error thresholds and reduced footprint.</p>
        </div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683f49edf222f7696fff389b/1748978165458/cut-June+2022.png" alt="Timeline event for June 2022" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=June+2022';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">June 2022</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum begins to move from GlobalFoundries Fab 10 into the flagship Fab 8 cleanroom.</p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/68c1b70d2cac9a0dba78842e/1757525773607/AFRL+1.png" alt="Timeline event for October 2022 AFRL partnership and $22.5M contract" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Oct+2022';" width="908" height="908">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">October 2022</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum unveils a partnership and major $22.5 million contract with the Air Force Research Laboratory (AFRL) in Rome, New York, marking the beginning of a years-long collaboration on quantum photonic chips.</p>
        </div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/683f49ec18dec15c46306ac6/1748978157925/cut-January+2023.png" alt="Timeline event for January 2023" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Jan+2023';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">January 2023</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">DARPA selects PsiQuantum to participate in its Underexplored Systems for Utility-Scale Quantum Computing (US2QC) program.</p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/687015d6e7ee2d546ba17c1a/1752176094134/cut-recent.png" alt="Timeline event for October 2023" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Oct+2023';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title"><a href="https://www.hartree.stfc.ac.uk/news/2023/10/04/psiquantum-partners-with-hartree-centre-to-develop-quantum-computing/" target="_blank">October 2023</a></h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum opens its first R&D facility outside the US at STFC’s Daresbury Laboratory, and partners with the Hartree Centre to co-develop fault-tolerant quantum algorithms, advancing industrial applications and cryogenic systems for large-scale quantum computing.</p>
        </div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/68470e11fa5a776dc743e3f5/1749487123764/cut-jan2024.png" alt="Timeline event for January 2024" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Jan+2024';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title"><a href="https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/darpa-advances-psiquantum-to-second-phase-of-utility-scale-quantum-computing-program" target="_blank">January 2024</a></h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">After making independent measurements of PsiQuantum's chips, DARPA advances the company to the second phase of their US2QC program.</p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/69cac58247036e34bb1cfc6a/1774896525665/Jeremy+April+2024.jpg" alt="Timeline event for April 2024" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=April+2024';" width="4240" height="2832">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">April 2024</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">In a landmark $940M AUD ($620M USD) investment from the Australian government, PsiQuantum announced its first utility-scale, fault-tolerant quantum computer to be built in Brisbane.</p>
        </div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/67fd309c74b7cc48cd2b1710/t/68470fcd1d0df55f3eb86851/1749487567841/curt-May-2024.png" alt="Timeline event for May 2024" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=May+2024';" width="474" height="566">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">May 2024</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum publishes its first <a href="https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/psiquantum-announces-qref-and-bartiq-open-source-software-for-better-tools-libraries-and-datasets" target="_blank">open-source software tools</a> for resource estimation of fault-tolerant quantum algorithms. These tools are being used by customer and software partners.</p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">

            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">July 2024</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum will build the first US-based utility-scale quantum computer at the new $500M Illinois Quantum & Microelectronics Park in Chicago, Illinois.</p>

            <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/68c1b3ade2b5d3682415e471/1757524909477/Group+181.png" alt="Timeline event for February 2025 (DARPA)" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Feb+2025';" width="2208" height="2334">
            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title"><a href="https://www.psiquantum.com/featured-news/darpa-final-phase" target="_blank">February 2025</a></h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">DARPA advances PsiQuantum to the final phase of their US2QC program. In this final phase, DARPA will evaluate PsiQuantum's design for utility-scale machines, component and architecture performance, use cases, and the case for economic utility.</p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">

            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title"><a href="https://www.psiquantum.com/news-import/omega" target="_blank">February 2025</a></h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum announces Omega, a manufacturable chipset for photonic quantum computing. This chipset includes all of the integrated photonic components needed to build utlity-scale quantum computers.</p>

        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">

            <h3 class="about-page-slider-outter-item-title">September 2025</h3>
            <p class="about-page-slider-outter-item-text">PsiQuantum announces that the company has raised $1 billion in Series E funding to continue building the world’s first commercially useful, fault-tolerant quantum computers.</p>

            <img src="https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/0dae0f05-89c3-4aa6-a10e-a6436e24d22e/Construct+logo+on+white.png?content-type=image%2Fpng" alt="Timeline event for September 2025 Construct launch" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Sept+2025';" width="2500" height="2656">

        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">
             <img src="https://static1.squarespace.com/static/63bdc0806d7fbd5344be5be2/t/68f1557292aaa97118749916/1760646521788/RMW-QuantumShoreGroundbreaking-0111-6802.jpg" alt="September 2025 groundbreaking ceremony at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park" class="about-page-slider-outter-item-image" onerror="this.onerror=null;this.src='https://placehold.co/450x535/1f1f1f/ffffff?text=Sept+2025';" width="3000" height="2000">

            </p>
        </div></div><div class="about-page-slider-outter-page" style="width: 1015px;"><div class="about-page-slider-outter-item-container">

    <script type="text/template" id="slider-items-data">
        <!-- Item 1: 2016 -->

             alt="September 2025 groundbreaking ceremony at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park"

              PsiQuantum breaks ground on the company’s site at the Illinois Quantum and Microelectronics Park in Chicago, where co-founder and CEO Jeremy O'Brien joined Governor JB Pritzker and other state and local leaders for a ceremony at the former U.S. Steel South Works site.

    </script>

    <script>
    (function() {
        // --- DOM ELEMENT REFERENCES ---
        let sliderContentEl, sliderTrackEl, paginationControlsEl, paginationActiveBarEl;

        // --- SLIDER STATE ---
        let actualPagesCount = 0;
        let currentPageIndex = 0;
        let currentTrackIndex = 1; // Start at 1 for the infinite loop clone
        let isDragging = false;
        let startX, currentX, initialTrackX = 0;
        // BUG FIX: Add variables to track vertical dragging to allow page scroll on mobile
        let startY, currentY;
        let previousItemsPerPage = 0;
        let originalItemsHTML = [];

        // --- CONSTANTS ---
        const dragThreshold = 50; // Minimum pixels to drag to trigger a slide
        const pageMargin = 20; // The space between pages (must match CSS)

        function getItemsPerPage() {
            if (window.innerWidth >= 1200) return 3;
            if (window.innerWidth >= 768) return 2;
            return 1;
        }
        function getSliderWidth() { return sliderContentEl ? sliderContentEl.offsetWidth : 0; }
        function getPageTotalWidth() {
            const margin = actualPagesCount > 1 ? pageMargin : 0;
            return getSliderWidth() + margin;
        }

        function setupSlider() {
            sliderContentEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-outter-content');
            sliderTrackEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-outter-track');
            paginationControlsEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-outter-pagination-controls');
            paginationActiveBarEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-outter-pagination-active-bar');

            if (!sliderContentEl || !sliderTrackEl || !paginationControlsEl) {
                console.error("Slider elements not found!");
                return;
            }

            if (originalItemsHTML.length === 0) {
                const template = document.getElementById('slider-items-data');
                if (template && template.innerHTML.trim() !== '') {
                    const tempDiv = document.createElement('div');
                    tempDiv.innerHTML = template.innerHTML;
                    originalItemsHTML = Array.from(tempDiv.children).map(el => el.outerHTML);
                } else {
                    console.error("Slider items data template not found or is empty.");
                    return; 
                }
            }

            sliderTrackEl.innerHTML = ''; 

            const itemsPerPage = getItemsPerPage();
            let dataForSlider = [];
            for (let i = 0; i < originalItemsHTML.length; i += itemsPerPage) {
                dataForSlider.push(originalItemsHTML.slice(i, i + itemsPerPage));
            }
            actualPagesCount = dataForSlider.length;
            previousItemsPerPage = itemsPerPage;

            rebuildPagination();

            if (actualPagesCount <= 1) { 
                if (dataForSlider.length > 0) {
                    const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                    pageElement.className = 'about-page-slider-outter-page';
                    pageElement.style.width = `${getSliderWidth()}px`;
                    pageElement.style.marginRight = '0px';
                    pageElement.innerHTML = dataForSlider[0].join('');
                    sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
                }
                updatePaginationBar();
                return;
            }

            const slidesToRender = [
                dataForSlider[actualPagesCount - 1],
                ...dataForSlider,
                dataForSlider[0]
            ];

            const sliderPageWidth = getSliderWidth();
            slidesToRender.forEach((pageDataItemsHTML) => {
                if (!pageDataItemsHTML) return;
                const pageElement = document.createElement('div');
                pageElement.className = 'about-page-slider-outter-page';
                pageElement.style.width = `${sliderPageWidth}px`;
                pageElement.innerHTML = pageDataItemsHTML.join('');
                sliderTrackEl.appendChild(pageElement);
            });
            
            currentPageIndex = (currentPageIndex >= actualPagesCount) ? actualPagesCount - 1 : currentPageIndex;
            currentTrackIndex = currentPageIndex + 1;

            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false);
            updatePaginationBar();
        }
        
        function rebuildPagination() {
            paginationControlsEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-outter-pagination-segment-clickable').forEach(seg => seg.remove());
            for (let i = 0; i < actualPagesCount; i++) {
                const segment = document.createElement('div');
                segment.className = 'about-page-slider-outter-pagination-segment-clickable';
                segment.addEventListener('click', () => navigateToPage(i));
                paginationControlsEl.appendChild(segment);
            }
        }

        function goToTrackIndex(trackIndex, animate = true) {
            if (!sliderTrackEl) return;
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = animate ? 'transform 0.5s ease-in-out' : 'none';
            const targetX = -trackIndex * getPageTotalWidth();
            sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${targetX}px)`;
            currentTrackIndex = trackIndex;
        }

        function handleInfiniteLoop() {
            if (actualPagesCount <= 1) return; 
            if (currentTrackIndex === 0) {
                currentPageIndex = actualPagesCount - 1;
                goToTrackIndex(actualPagesCount, false);
            } else if (currentTrackIndex === actualPagesCount + 1) {
                currentPageIndex = 0;
                goToTrackIndex(1, false);
            } else {
                currentPageIndex = currentTrackIndex - 1;
            }
            updatePaginationBar();
        }
        
        function navigateToPage(pageDataIndex) {
            if (pageDataIndex < 0 || pageDataIndex >= actualPagesCount) return;
            if (pageDataIndex === currentPageIndex && !isDragging) return;
            currentTrackIndex = pageDataIndex + 1;
            goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
        }

        function updatePaginationBar() {
            if (!paginationActiveBarEl) return;
            if (actualPagesCount <= 1) {
                 paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `0%`;
                 return;
            }
            const segmentWidthPercentage = 100 / actualPagesCount;
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.width = `${segmentWidthPercentage}%`;
            const activeBarPositionPercentage = currentPageIndex * 100;
            paginationActiveBarEl.style.transform = `translateX(${activeBarPositionPercentage}%)`;
        }

        function handleDragStart(e) {
            if (actualPagesCount <= 1) return;
            isDragging = true;
            startX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            startY = e.pageY || e.touches[0].pageY; 
            sliderTrackEl.style.transition = 'none';
            initialTrackX = -currentTrackIndex * getPageTotalWidth();
            sliderContentEl.classList.add('about-page-slider-outter-dragging');
        }

        function handleDragMove(e) {
            if (!isDragging || actualPagesCount <= 1) return;
            currentX = e.pageX || e.touches[0].pageX;
            currentY = e.pageY || e.touches[0].pageY;
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            const diffY = currentY - startY;
            if (Math.abs(diffX) > Math.abs(diffY)) {
                e.preventDefault(); 
                sliderTrackEl.style.transform = `translateX(${initialTrackX + diffX}px)`;
            }
        }

        function handleDragEnd() {
            if (!isDragging || actualPagesCount <= 1) return;
            isDragging = false;
            sliderContentEl.classList.remove('about-page-slider-outter-dragging');
            const diffX = currentX - startX;
            if (Math.abs(diffX) > 50) {
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex + (diffX < 0 ? 1 : -1), true);
            } else {
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, true);
            }
        }
        
        function handleResize() {
            const newItemsPerPage = getItemsPerPage();
            if (newItemsPerPage !== previousItemsPerPage) {
                setupSlider();
            } else {
                if (!sliderTrackEl) return;
                const pages = sliderTrackEl.querySelectorAll('.about-page-slider-outter-page');
                const newSliderWidth = getSliderWidth();
                pages.forEach(page => { page.style.width = `${newSliderWidth}px`; });
                goToTrackIndex(currentTrackIndex, false);
                updatePaginationBar();
            }
        }
        
        function init() {
            setupSlider();
            const contentEl = document.getElementById('about-page-slider-outter-content');
            if(contentEl && sliderTrackEl){
                contentEl.addEventListener('mousedown', handleDragStart);
                contentEl.addEventListener('touchstart', handleDragStart, { passive: true });
                sliderTrackEl.addEventListener('transitionend', handleInfiniteLoop);

                document.addEventListener('mousemove', handleDragMove);
                document.addEventListener('mouseup', handleDragEnd);
                document.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { if (isDragging) handleDragEnd(); });
                document.addEventListener('touchmove', handleDragMove, { passive: false });
                document.addEventListener('touchend', handleDragEnd);
            }
            window.addEventListener('resize', handleResize);
        }

        if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
            document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
        } else {
            init();
        }
    })();
    </script>



  
</div>
</div></div></div></div></div>
    </div>
  
  </div>

    <style>
        /* --- START: FACILITIES SLIDER CSS --- */

        /* Main container */
        #facilities-slider-outter-container {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 1440px;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
            overflow: hidden;
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
        }

        /* Content area */
        #facilities-slider-outter-content {
            cursor: grab;
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            margin-bottom: 30px;
            width: 100%;
        }

        #facilities-slider-outter-content.facilities-slider-outter-dragging {
            cursor: grabbing;
        }

        #facilities-slider-outter-content.facilities-slider-outter-dragging * {
            user-select: none;
            -webkit-user-select: none;
            -ms-user-select: none;
        }

        /* Track container */
        #facilities-slider-outter-track {
            display: flex;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease-in-out;
        }

        /* Slider page */
        .facilities-slider-outter-page {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: flex-start;
            padding: 0 0.5rem;
            gap: 1.25rem; /* 20px */
        }

        /* Slider item */
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            width: 100%; /* Default to 100% for mobile */
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        /* Item image */
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-image {
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            aspect-ratio: 345 / 190;
            border-radius: 5px;
            object-fit: cover;
            cursor: pointer;
            margin-bottom: 17px;
        }

        /* Item location text */
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-location {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            color: #7e58f5;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
        }

        /* Item title */
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-title {
            font-size: 22px !important;
            line-height: 1.4;
            font-family: 'Inter Medium';
            color: #ffffff;
            margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* Item description */
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-text {
            font-size: 16px;
            line-height: 1.5;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            color: #ffffff;
            margin: 0 0 2.5rem 0;
            display: -webkit-box;
            -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
            -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            min-height: calc(1.5em * 3);
        }

        /* Item link */
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-link {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-family: 'Inter Light';
            color: #ffffff;
            text-decoration: none;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            margin-top: auto;
            transition: color 0.2s ease;
        }
        
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-link:hover {
            color: #7e58f5;
        }
        
        .facilities-slider-outter-item-link svg {
            margin-left: 0.5em;
            width: 1.1em;
            height: 1.1em;
            stroke: currentColor;
            stroke-width: 2;
        }

        /* --- RESPONSIVENESS --- */

        @media (min-width: 768px) {
            .facilities-slider-outter-item-container {
                width: calc(50% - (1.25rem / 2));
            }
            .facilities-slider-outter-item-title {
                font-size: 22px;
            }
            .facilities-slider-outter-item-text {
                font-size: 18px;
                min-height: calc(1.5em * 2);
                -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
            }
        }
        
        @media (min-width: 1200px) {
            .facilities-slider-outter-item-container {
                width: calc(25% - (1.25rem * 3 / 4));
            }
            .facilities-slider-outter-item-title {
                font-size: 24px;
            }
        }

        /* --- PAGINATION --- */
        #facilities-slider-outter-pagination-controls {
            display: flex;
            width: 100%;
            height: 2px;
            background-color: #333;
            position: relative;
        }

        #facilities-slider-outter-pagination-active-bar {
            height: 100%;
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7735fc 0%, #ba97fc 50%, #7735fc 100%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: facilitiesSliderSweepDirect 1.8s linear infinite alternate;
            transition: transform 0.5s ease-in-out, width 0.5s ease-in-out;
            z-index: 2;
        }

        @keyframes facilitiesSliderSweepDirect {
            0% { background-position: 0% 50%; }
            100% { background-position: 100% 50%; }
        }

        .facilities-slider-outter-pagination-segment-clickable {
            flex: 1;
            cursor: pointer;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
        }
    </style>
